Functions
fza_dms_fnc_routeDelPoint
Description

Deletes a point from the currently selected route using an index preserved the current Selected route point handles the reset of wpt aproach if equal to deleted point

Parameters
_heli

The apache

Returns

Nothing

Examples
[_heli, _routePoint, _index] call fza_dms_fnc_routeData
Author

Snow(Dryden)
